title: hordeum brachyantherum subsp. californicum
intro: Hordeum brachyantherum subsp. californicum, also known as California wild barley, is a subspecies of wild barley that is native to the western coast of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hordeum brachyantherum subsp. californicum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the seeds of this plant can be used to make a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
